title: Time Becomes State
prompt: Trace how a clock converts gradual material change into visible events.

title: Sequence Is Material
prompt: Identify the parts that order action: float, cam, lever, gear, latch, or reservoir.

title: Trigger Then Output
prompt: Find the threshold or contact point that activates the next event.

title: Avoid Robot Myth
prompt: Use automata and sequenced mechanical action rather than projecting modern robotics backward.
